name: Spatial Advection Operator
abstract: Linear advection term -v·∇u. Implemented in model.global.Advection.java. Combined with any local kinetic model and diffusion to produce a DIFICI travelling-wave system.
description:
# Spatial Advection Operator
**Term:** `-v·∇u`
Implemented in `model.global.Advection.java`. Differential advection between species (v1 ≠ v2) triggers DIFICI travelling waves even when D1 = D2.

examples.title: DIFICI scenario — differential advection in x

annotatedSchema:

  vy:

  vz:
